functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot._stop_process
documentation: Stops a `build` or `run` process with the given id.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot._check_process_status
documentation: Checks the status of a `build` or `run` process with the given id.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.start_build
documentation:
Starts a `build` process with the given preset.

This runs a background task to check the status of the process every 2 seconds.

Args:
    preset (Preset): The preset to set the build process for. Must be among ("success", "failure", "loop")

Returns:
    {"status": "ok", "build_id": build_id}: in case of **starting** the build process successfully.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.stop_build
documentation:
Stops a `build` process with the given id.

Args:
    build_id (int): The id of the process to stop.
    build_id (BuildManager): The process manager dependency to stop the process with.

Raises:
    HTTPException: With status code 404 if the process is not found.

Returns:
    {"status": "ok"}: in case of stopping a process successfully.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.check_build_status
documentation:
Checks the status of a `build` process with the given id.

Args:
    build_id (int): The id of the process to check.
    build_manager (BuildManager): The process manager dependency to check the process with.

Raises:
    HTTPException: With status code 404 if the process is not found.

Returns:
    {"status": "completed"}: in case of a successfully completed process.
    {"status": "running"}: in case of a still running process.
    {"status": "stopped"}: in case of a stopped process.
    {"status": "failed"}: in case of a failed-to-run process.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.check_build_processes
documentation:
Checks the status of all `build` processes and returns them along with their runs info.

The offset and limit parameters can be used to paginate the results.

Args:
    build_id (Optional[int]): The id of the process to check. If not specified, all processes will be returned.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.get_build_logs
documentation:
Gets the logs of a specific `build` process.

The offset and limit parameters can be used to paginate the results.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.start_run
documentation:
Starts a `run` process with the given preset.

This runs a background task to check the status of the process every 2 seconds.

Args:
    build_id (int): The id of the build process to start running.
    preset (Preset): The preset to set the build process for. Must be among ("success", "failure", "loop")

Returns:
    {"status": "ok", "build_id": run_id}: in case of **starting** the run process successfully.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.stop_run
documentation:
Stops a `run` process with the given id.

Args:
    run_id (int): The id of the process to stop.
    run_manager (RunManager): The process manager dependency to stop the process with.

Raises:
    HTTPException: With status code 404 if the process is not found.

Returns:
    {"status": "ok"}: in case of stopping a process successfully.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.check_run_status
documentation:
Checks the status of a `run` process with the given id.

Args:
    build_id (int): The id of the process to check.
    run_manager (RunManager): The process manager dependency to check the process with.

Raises:
    HTTPException: With status code 404 if the process is not found.

Returns:
    {"status": "alive"}: in case of a successfully run process. Now it is able to communicate.
    {"status": "running"}: in case of a still running process.
    {"status": "stopped"}: in case of a stopped process.
    {"status": "failed"}: in case of a failed-to-run process.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.check_run_processes
documentation:
Checks the status of all `run` processes and returns them.

The offset and limit parameters can be used to paginate the results.

Args:
    run_id (Optional[int]): The id of the process to check. If not specified, all processes will be returned.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.api.api_v1.endpoints.bot.get_run_logs
documentation:
Gets the logs of a specific `run` process.

The offset and limit parameters can be used to paginate the results.

modules.name: chatsky_ui.services.process
documentation:
Process classes.
-----------------

Classes for build and run processes.

classes.name: chatsky_ui.services.process.Process

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process.Process.start
documentation: Starts an asyncronous process with the given command.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process.Process.get_full_info
documentation:
Get the values of the attributes mentioned in the list.

Args:
    attributes (list): A list of attributes to get the values of.

Returns:
    dict: A dictionary containing the values of the attributes mentioned in the list.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process.Process.periodically_check_status
documentation: Periodically checks the process status and updates the database.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process.Process.check_status
documentation:
Returns the process current status.

Returns:
    - Status.NULL: When a process is initiated but not started yet. This condition is unusual and typically
        indicates incorrect usage or a process misuse in backend logic.
    - Status.ALIVE: process is alive and ready to communicate
    - Status.RUNNING: process is still trying to get alive. no communication
    - Status.COMPLETED: returncode is 0
    - Status.FAILED: returncode is 1
    - Status.STOPPED: returncode is -15
    - Status.FAILED_WITH_UNEXPECTED_CODE: failed with other returncode

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process.Process.stop
documentation:
Stops the process.

Raises:
    ProcessLookupError: If the process doesn't exist or already exited.
    RuntimeError: If the process has not started yet.
Base for build and run processes.

modules.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager
documentation:
Process manager
----------------

Process managers are used to manage run and build processes. They are responsible for
starting, stopping, updating, and checking status of processes. Processes themselves
are stored in the `processes` dictionary of process managers.

classes.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.get_last_id
documentation: Gets the maximum id among processes of type BuildProcess or RunProcess.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.stop
documentation:
Stops the process with the given id.

raises:
    ProcessLookupError: If the process with the given id is not found.
    RuntimeError: If the process has not started yet.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.check_status
documentation:
Checks the status of the process with the given id by calling the `periodically_check_status`
method of the process.

This updates the process status in the database every 2 seconds.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.get_status
documentation: Checks the status of the process with the given id by calling the `check_status` method of the process.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.get_process_info
documentation: Returns metadata of a specific process identified by its unique ID.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.get_full_info
documentation: Returns metadata of `limit` number of processes, starting from the offset\`\`th process.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.ProcessManager.fetch_process_logs
documentation: Returns the logs of one process according to its id. If the process is not found, returns None.
Base for build and run process managers.

classes.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.RunManager

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.RunManager.start
documentation:
Starts a new run process.

Increases the maximum existing id by 1 and assigns it to the new process.
Starts the process and appends it to the processes list.

Args:
    build_id (int): the build id to run
    preset (Preset): the preset to use among ("success", "failure", "loop")

Returns:
    int: the id of the new started process

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.RunManager.get_run_info
documentation: Returns metadata of  a specific run process identified by its unique ID.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.RunManager.get_full_info
documentation: Returns metadata of `limit` number of run processes, starting from the offset\`\`th process.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.RunManager.fetch_run_logs
documentation:
Returns the logs of one run according to its id.

Number of loglines returned is based on `offset` as the start line and limited by `limit` lines.
Process manager for running a Chatsky pipeline.

classes.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager.start
documentation:
Starts a new build process.

Increases the maximum existing id by 1 and assigns it to the new process.
Starts the process and appends it to the processes list.

Args:
    preset (Preset): the preset to use among ("success", "failure", "loop")

Returns:
    int: the id of the new started process

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager.check_status
documentation:
Checks the build "id_" process status by calling the `periodically_check_status`
method of the process.

This updates the process status in the database every 2 seconds.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager.get_build_info
documentation:
Returns metadata of a specific build process identified by its unique ID.

Args:

: `id_` (int): the id of the build
  `run_manager` (RunManager): the run manager to use for getting all runs of this build

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager.get_full_info
documentation: Returns metadata of `limit` number of processes, starting from the `offset` process.

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager.get_full_info_with_runs_info
documentation:
Returns metadata of `limit` number of processes, starting from the offset\`\`th process.

Args:

: run_manager (RunManager): the run manager to use for getting all runs of this build

methods.name: chatsky_ui.services.process_manager.BuildManager.fetch_build_logs
documentation:
Returns the logs of one build according to its id.

Number of loglines returned is based on `offset` as the start line and limited by `limit` lines.
Process manager for converting a frontned graph to a Chatsky script.

functions.name: chatsky_ui.utils.ast_utils.get_imports_from_file
documentation:
Gets all imports from a file and returns them as strings separated by newlines.

    Example:
    >>> get_imports_from_file('file.py')
    'import os
from pathlib import Path'

functions.name: chatsky_ui.clients.chatsky_client.get_chatsky_conditions
documentation:
Gets the Chatsky's out-of-the-box conditions.

Returns:
    List of conditions info with the following keys:
        "label": The condition name suggestions to pop up for user.
        "type": "function".
        "info": Detailed info about every condition, parsed from Chatsky docs.
        "apply": Autocompletion of the conditon call.
